settings.title: Our Avalon Showroom
settings.description:
We opened the doors to our first showroom in 2018 and feel fortunate that we are located a stone’s throw away from Avalon Beach, on Sydney’s Northern Beaches.

It was important to us when designing the space that we were creating an environment that represents who we are; with every detail being carefully considered so that our clients feel comfortable and warmly welcomed.
settings.feature_text: We provide a luxury experience in a beautiful setting, but without losing our connection to the process and our craft.

settings.title: Our Paddington Showroom
settings.description:
An immersive home for craft, connection, and creativity. Located in the heart of Paddington, our atelier is a thoughtfully designed space that embodies our values of connection, craftsmanship, and conscious luxury.

More than just a store, the atelier invites you into our world - a place where you can experience our collections up close, explore the materials and techniques behind each piece, and engage with the story of our brand. Every detail has been carefully considered to reflect the warmth, care, and intention that defines our work.

settings.title: Our Paddington Showroom

settings.feature_text: Where craftsmanship comes to life - a space to connect with the artistry in every material and technique.

settings.title: Bespoke Experience
settings.description:
Our aim is to provide a laid-back experience where all are welcome to share a coffee or a glass of champagne while browsing our collection and taking in the action of our busy jewellers at work on the other side of the glass doors. 

This is not your typical jewellery shop, the shelves are peppered with eclectic ceramics and curated artisan pieces, sitting along-side our jewellery showcases. We have two private consultation rooms to host our bespoke clients, where couples can discuss wedding bands privately over a glass of champagne, or engagement ring clients can pick apart different stone options and designs with a level of discretion and with the one on one focus of one of our bespoke designers.

settings.title: Most Loved
settings.description: Physical expressions of love exchanged with those we hold closest. For when words can’t quite match the gratitude.

settings.title: Avalon
settings.description:
We are passionate about the community that we work and live in and when taking the time to visit us, we encourage you to spend the day here in Avalon or even the weekend! Take the opportunity to slow down, spend time at the beach, potter around the shops, visit the local eateries and explore the many gems that this area has to offer. 

Discover our Welcome to our Neighbourhood Guide, where our team have thoughtfully put together some of their favourite things to see, eat and do while you are in town.
